peirce_classification.firstness: Bash history shows copying of confidential files, compression, and transfer with Perl script
peirce_classification.secondness: Use of external proxy and download of privilege escalation exploit indicate deliberate preparation
peirce_classification.thirdness: Steve Vogon planned and executed confidential data exfiltration using privilege escalation, compression, and an external proxy to bypass security controls
